mapper.insert: INSERT INTO RCA.TB_ANOMALOUS_TRAFFIC SELECT NULL, CPI.STRIFID, PM.IF_ID, CPI.STRRESID, PM.NODE_ID , CPI.STRTYPEMIN, CPI.INTTIMESTAMP, CPI.INTYEAR, CPI.INTMONTH, CPI.INTDAY , CPI.INTHOUR, CPI.INTMIN, CPI.INTWEEK, CPI.INTBANDWIDTH, CPI.FLTBPSIN , CPI.FLTBPSOUT, CPI.FLTPPSIN, CPI.FLTPPSOUT, CPI.FLTERRORIN, CPI.FLTERROROUT , CPI.FLTDISCARDIN, CPI.FLTDISCARDOUT, CPI.FLTUNKNOWN, CPI.FLTUSAGE, CPI.FLHCINOCTETS , CPI.FLHCOUTOCTETS, CPI.FLHCINUCASTPKTS, CPI.FLHCOUTUCASTPKTS, CPI.FLHCINMULTICASTPKTS, CPI.FLHCOUTMULTICASTPKTS , CPI.FLHCINBROADCASTPKTS, CPI.FLHCOUTBROADCASTPKTS, CPI.FLTBPSINMAX, CPI.FLTBPSOUTMAX, CPI.FLTPPSINMAX , CPI.FLTPPSOUTMAX, CPI.FLTERRORINMAX, CPI.FLTERROROUTMAX, CPI.FLTDISCARDINMAX, CPI.FLTDISCARDOUTMAX , CPI.FLTUNKNOWNMAX, CPI.FLTUSAGEMAX, #{fltbpsinAnomaly} ::boolean, #{fltbpsoutAnomaly} ::boolean FROM IP_YD.XE_CVNMS_PERF_IF CPI LEFT OUTER JOIN RESOURCE.TB_PORT_MST PM ON CPI.STRIFID = PM.IF_NUM AND CPI.STRRESID = PM.NODE_NUM WHERE CPI.STRIFID = #{strifid} AND CPI.INTTIMESTAMP = #{inttimestamp} ::integer

INSERT INTO RCA.TB_AI_ANOMALOUS ( STRIFID, INTTIMESTAMP, FLTBPSIN, FLTBPSIN_PREDICT, FLTBPSIN_THRESHOLD_UPPER, FLTBPSIN_THRESHOLD_LOWER, FLTBPSIN_ANOMALY, FLTBPSOUT, FLTBPSOUT_PREDICT, FLTBPSOUT_THRESHOLD_UPPER, FLTBPSOUT_THRESHOLD_LOWER, FLTBPSOUT_ANOMALY ) VALUES ( #{strifid}, #{inttimestamp} ::integer, #{fltbpsin}, #{fltbpsin_predict}, #{fltbpsin_threshold_upper}, #{fltbpsin_threshold_lower}, #{fltbpsin_anomaly}, #{fltbpsout}, #{fltbpsout_predict}, #{fltbpsout_threshold_upper}, #{fltbpsout_threshold_lower}, #{fltbpsout_anomaly} )

INSERT INTO RCA.TB_AI_NOXIOUS ( STRRESIP, STRRESNAME, STRS_IP, STRS_PORT, STRD_IP, STRD_PORT, STRS_MAC, STRD_MAC, STRPROTOCOL, STRIPV4TOS, STRCHANNEL, STRSENDERIP, STRIN_INTERFACE, STROUT_INTERFACE, STRBYTES_COL, STRCOUNTS, DATEREGDATE, ANOMALY ) VALUES ( #{strresip}, #{strresname}, #{strs_ip}, #{strs_port}, #{strd_ip}, #{strd_port}, #{strs_mac}, #{strd_mac}, #{strprotocol}, #{stripv4tos}, #{strchannel}, #{strsenderip}, #{strin_interface}, #{strout_interface}, #{strbytes_col}, #{strcounts}, #{dateregdate} ::timestamp, #{anomaly} )
